refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with garbage. The surrounding area appears to be littered with waste.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital in a rural area and was appalled to see the trash bins outside overflowing with garbage. The area was littered with waste and had a strong unpleasant odor. This is a serious health concern and needs to be addressed immediately.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are overflowing, it's really gross and smells bad.
